name: commit-migration
description: Analyze Android commit or branch changes and help AI apply equivalent changes to the current branch with package, class, and resource-aware adaptation.

interface.shortDescription: Port Android commits across branches with mapping-aware analysis
interface.longDescription: Use Commit Migration to analyze Android commits, commit ranges, and branch diffs, map package and file changes onto the current repository, surface resource candidates, and generate the follow-up checks an AI agent should use before finalizing a branch migration.
defaultPrompt: Apply commit 45959162 to the current Android branch
Analyze the latest 3 commits from origin/feature_x for migration
Map package and resource changes from commit range A..B
